hero.name: Dr. Elise Monserrat Rodriguez
hero.subtitle: Where elegance meets science
hero.description: General Medicine, Regenerative Medicine, Anti-aging and Aesthetic Medicine

sobreMi.descripcion:
Dr. Elise Monserrat Rodríguez is a general physician with training in aesthetic and regenerative medicine, specialized in comprehensive anti-aging and facial and body harmonization.

Her practice is based on medical diagnosis, precise anatomical criteria, and evidence-based protocols. Each treatment is designed in a personalized manner, prioritizing safety, natural results, and progressive outcomes that respect the patient's identity. She integrates comprehensive medical evaluation, detailed anatomical planning, and advanced technology in every intervention, ensuring harmonious and sustainable results over time.

Her approach combines science, technological innovation, and aesthetic sensitivity to enhance individual beauty without altering essence. She develops strategic plans that integrate skin health, tissue regeneration, and overall well-being, with a philosophy centered on natural results, prevention, and progressive regeneration.

She practices in Hermosillo, Sonora, where she leads her clinic under strict standards of medical ethics, clinical excellence, and personalized care.
